title: betula × dugleana
intro: Betula × dugleana, also known as the Hybrid Silver Birch, is a cross between the paper birch (Betula papyrifera) and the river birch (Betula nana). The bark of the Betula × dugleana plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Betula × dugleana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Betula × dugleana include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of conditions, from skin conditions to respiratory issues.
